description: Influencer-driven restaurant or food venue promotion during Ramadan featuring personal experience narratives, location tags, and pricing details to drive foot traffic and brand awareness.
structural_recipe: Feature a specific restaurant or food venue with: (1) Arabic caption describing the Ramadan dining experience; (2) Explicit pricing per person in SAR; (3) Location tag with street address; (4) Influencer mention or handle; (5) Personal experience language ('تجربتي' / 'my experience'); (6) Seasonal context (Ramadan tent/خيمة); (7) Superlative descriptors ('فوق الرائعة' / 'amazing'). Structure as narrative testimonial rather than advertisement.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences trust peer recommendations and influencer endorsements during festive seasons like Ramadan. Explicit pricing removes friction in decision-making. Location tagging enables direct navigation. Arabic-language authenticity and emotional experience framing create cultural resonance and authenticity, particularly for premium dining venues where social proof influences spending decisions.
transplantation_caveats: Ramadan-specific timing may limit year-round applicability—adapt seasonal language for non-Ramadan periods
Premium pricing (232 SAR) assumes affluent audience segment—adjust for different demographics
Requires authentic influencer partnership; inauthentic endorsements risk backlash in Saudi market
Location-specific content may not scale across multiple venues without localization
cultural_constraints: Must respect Ramadan dining etiquette and cultural sensitivities
Avoid imagery that conflicts with conservative social norms
Premium positioning requires alignment with affluent lifestyle expectations
